title: OnePlus halts operations in USA and Europe
author: pilililo2
relevanceReason: OnePlus 是一家知名的智能手机和科技产品制造商，其在美国和欧洲暂停运营属于科技产品行业重大动态。
summaryRaw: Introducing our new OnePlus Community experience, with a completely revamped structure, built from the ground-up.
summaryZh: 一加宣布暂停在美国和欧洲地区的运营
一加推出全新社区体验平台，结构全面重构
highlightsZh: 一加在欧美市场暂停运营引发广泛关注
涉及智能手机及科技硬件行业重大变动
可能影响一加全球市场布局及用户服务
一加同步推出全新社区平台

comments.author: freedomben
comments.textRawHtml:
OnePlus is one of the saddest stories out there. It was the hacker's choice for a while. It was originally the "Never Settle" phone that ran mostly stock android, had specs maxxed out, price was great, and bootloader was unlocked plus they provided factory images. Those were all reasons I bought a lot of OnePlus phones in the early years.

Then they flushed nearly all of it down the toilet. The day they stopped posting factory images was the day I saw the writing on the wall. Such a shame.
comments.textZhHtml:
OnePlus 是最悲伤的故事之一。 有一段时间，这是黑客的选择。 它最初是一款“永不安定”的手机，主要运行安卓系统，规格最高，价格很棒，引导加载程序已解锁，而且他们还提供了工厂映像。 这些都是我早年购买大量 OnePlus 手机的原因。

然后他们几乎把所有手机都冲进了马桶。 他们停止发布工厂图片的那一天就是我看到不祥之兆的那一天。 真可惜。

children.author: MYEUHD
children.textRawHtml:
> had specs maxxed out

Indeed, their 10 year old flagship has 6GB of RAM.

https://www.gsmarena.com/oneplus_3-7995.php

(for comparison, last year's iPhone 17 has just 8GB or RAM, 9 years later)
children.textZhHtml:
> 的规格已经达到极限

事实上，他们 10 年前的旗舰产品拥有 6GB RAM。

https://www.gsmarena.com/oneplus_3-7995.php

（作为比较，去年的 iPhone 17 只有 8GB 或 RAM，9 年后）

children.author: freedomben
children.textRawHtml:
Yeah I remember buying a OnePlus 7 Pro with 12 GB (!) of RAM like 7 years ago. The processor was also bleeding edge and that sucker ripped. It combined with stuff like termux was so capable that I used it to run all kinds of stuff that makes little sense on a normal phone. The day that phone retired (from drop damage) was heartbreaking*.

* It actually ran even longer after that as various utilities but not a daily driver, but when I didn't have it with me all the time the convenience slowly waned and it got forgotten
children.textZhHtml:
是的，我记得 7 年前购买了一台配备 12 GB (!) RAM 的 OnePlus 7 Pro。 处理器也很先进，而且那个傻瓜撕裂了。 它与 termux 之类的东西结合起来非常强大，我用它来运行各种在普通手机上几乎没有意义的东西。 手机退役（因跌落损坏）的那一天令人心碎*。

* 在那之后，它实际上运行了更长的时间，作为各种公用事业，但不是日常司机，但当我一直没有带着它时，便利性慢慢减弱，它被遗忘了

children.author: 8n4vidtmkvmk
children.textRawHtml:
That's the phone I was using too. Gave it to my wife a couple years ago and she used it until just a couple months ago when it too suffered a fatal drop. Very sad.

Good phone. I was worried about that pop up camera failing at some point, but it never did
children.textZhHtml:
这也是我使用的手机。几年前把它给了我的妻子，她一直使用它，直到几个月前它也遭受了致命的下降。非常难过。

很好的手机。我担心弹出式摄像头会在某个时候出现故障，但它从来没有出现过

children.author: freedomben
children.textRawHtml: Indeed, that pop up camera worried me too but was never an issue.  It survived lots of pocket lint, and even beach sand and was always reliable.  I'd easily trade the current "notch" approach on most phones for a pop up camera (assuming similar quality).
children.textZhHtml: 确实，那款弹出式摄像头也曾让我担忧，但从来没出过问题。它经受住了大量口袋棉絮甚至海滩沙子的考验，一直非常可靠。如果质量相当的话，我宁愿用弹出式摄像头来换取目前大多数手机上的“刘海”设计。

children.author: robotnikman
children.textRawHtml: Same. Oneplus showed that the pop up camera was a perfectly workable approach for the front camera instead of using a notch.
children.textZhHtml: 同感。一加证明了弹出式摄像头是前置摄像头的一种完全可行的方案，而不必采用刘海屏。

children.author: xp84
children.textRawHtml:
Boy, do I miss the amount of diversity and innovation we used to have in cell phones. I remember having this phone [1] which put the camera on a little rotating thing so you could use the same one for front or back facing - obviously this either saves money or means they have twice the budget for the cameras as if they had two.

Obviously these cameras themselves were potato cameras compared to modern ones, but this design was still a great innovation and unique. We rarely get many design ideas that are that different today, as everyone mainly just wants to look like an iPhone, and Apple for its part only sits around obsessing on how they can make the iPhone's form more and more featureless and pure.

https://www.mobilecollectors.net/phone/6666/lg-vx-7000
children.textZhHtml:
天哪，我真怀念过去手机那种百花齐放、充满创新的年代。我记得有一款手机[1]，把摄像头装在一个可旋转的小装置上，这样前后置就能共用同一个摄像头——这显然要么省了钱，要么意味着他们给摄像头的预算是装两个摄像头的两倍。

显然，与现代摄像头相比，这些摄像头本身的画质简直惨不忍睹，但这种设计依然是一项伟大的创新，独具匠心。如今我们很少能见到如此截然不同的设计理念了，因为大家主要只想做得像iPhone，而苹果自己则只顾着痴迷于如何让iPhone的外观变得越来越极简和纯粹。

https://www.mobilecollectors.net/phone/6666/lg-vx-7000

children.author: h4ch1
children.textRawHtml:
I still daily drive a Oneplus 7T; for ~$350 in 2020, it's served me incredibly well, barely any performance drop over the years.

The battery has weakened ofc, the 2 day battery life has dropped to a measly 9 hours, but that's more than enough.
children.textZhHtml:
我仍然每天开一加7T； 2020 年售价约 350 美元，它对我来说非常好，多年来几乎没有任何性能下降。

电池已经减弱 ofc，2 天的电池寿命下降到区区 9 小时，但这已经足够了。

children.author: ricw
children.textRawHtml:
Not an apples to apples comparison#. iOS uses way less ram than android, plus has memory compression. That’s why Apple gets away with less ram and much smaller batteries with equal or better performance.

# pun intended
children.textZhHtml:
不是同类比较#。 iOS 使用的内存比 Android 少得多，而且还具有内存压缩功能。这就是为什么苹果可以使用更少的内存和更小的电池来实现相同或更好的性能。

# 双关语意图

children.author: MYEUHD
children.textRawHtml: Of course it's not an apple to apple comparison, the iPhone 7 from the same year was 50% more expensive and had only one third of the RAM (2 GB)
children.textZhHtml: 当然，这不是苹果与苹果之间的比较，同年的 iPhone 7 贵了 50%，而且只有三分之一的 RAM (2 GB)

children.author: microtonal
children.textRawHtml:
plus has memory compression.

FYI, Android has had zRAM support since KitKat, which is from (checking notes) 2013. Same year as iOS.

iOS uses way less ram than android

Common measurements I have seen is around 40%, I wouldn't say way less, but it is definitely less. Still, 3x more for a model in the same year is impressive (and more than needed to be competitive with iOS) and we should give OnePlus credit for it.

Sadly a lot of low-ish to midrange phones are going back or sticking to 6-8GB today, thanks to the RAM squeeze and the efficiency of iOS is certainly helping Apple here. Certainly nobody is going to complain about the performance of the iPhone 17, despite only having 8GB RAM.

In Android, Samsung doesn't seem to suffer as much. You can pick up an S26 here with 12GB RAM and 256GB storage for 623 Euro, which is a nice midrange price. I guess there are benefits if you can produce your own memory.
children.textZhHtml:
plus 具有内存压缩功能。

仅供参考，Android 从 KitKat 开始就支持 zRAM，这是从（查看笔记）2013 年开始的。与 iOS 同年。

iOS 使用的内存比 Android 少得多

我见过的常见测量值约为 40%，我不会说远少，但它绝对是更少。尽管如此，同年一款机型的容量增加 3 倍仍然令人印象深刻（而且超过了与 iOS 竞争所需的容量），我们应该为此归功于 OnePlus。

遗憾的是，由于 RAM 的挤压，许多中低端到中端手机正在回退或坚持使用 6-8GB 内存，而 iOS 的效率无疑在这方面为苹果提供了帮助。当然，没有人会抱怨 iPhone 17 的性能，尽管它只有 8GB RAM。

在 Android 方面，三星似乎并没有受到太大影响。你可以在这里购买一台配备 12GB RAM 和 256GB 存储空间的 S26，价格为 623 欧元，这是一个不错的中端价格。我想如果你能产生自己的记忆的话会有好处。

children.author: basilikum
children.textRawHtml:
> 623 Euro, which is a nice midrange price [for a phone].

How did we get here?
children.textZhHtml:
> 623欧元，对于[手机]来说是个不错的中端价格。

我们是怎么走到这一步的？

children.author: layer8
children.textRawHtml: Apple is already past that, with the entry-level 17e starting at 700 Euro. The midrange regular 17 starts at 950 Euro. And according to rumors those prices are likely to increase in spring if not earlier.
children.textZhHtml: 苹果早就超过这个价位了，入门级的17e起售价已达700欧元。中端的标准版17起售价为950欧元。而且据传闻，如果不更早的话，这些价格很可能在今年春季上涨。

children.author: robotresearcher
children.textRawHtml:
> entry-level 17e starting at 700 Euro

Which is 30% less than the original iPhone accounting for inflation.
children.textZhHtml:
> 入门级17e起售价700欧元

考虑到通货膨胀因素，这比初代iPhone便宜了30%。

children.author: robotresearcher
children.textRawHtml:
iPhone 1 launched at 649 Euros in France in 2007 money, or about 980 Euros today.

Given inflation and the increased utility of the smartphone, we're almost certainly at the lowest cost per hour of use ever for most people.
children.textZhHtml:
初代iPhone在2007年于法国上市时的售价为649欧元，折合今天大约为980欧元。

考虑到通货膨胀以及智能手机实用性的提升，对大多数人来说，我们现在几乎肯定处于有史以来每小时使用成本最低的水平。

children.author: oarsinsync
children.textRawHtml:
> for most people

For most people, salaries have not kept up with inflation
children.textZhHtml:
> 对大多数人来说

对大多数人而言，薪资涨幅并未跟上通货膨胀的步伐

children.author: xp84
children.textRawHtml: What's funny is that due in part to minimum wage laws (which caused some of the inflation) the lowest quintile is arguably the one who's kept up with inflation better than the rest, meaning there has been an improvement in the wealth inequality department. But nobody talks about it. Meanwhile I've lost like 20% of my buying power to inflation in the past 3-4 years even taking the meager raises into account.
children.textZhHtml: 有趣的是，部分由于最低工资法（这也引发了一定程度的通胀），收入最低的五分之一人群可以说是受通胀影响最小、最能跟上通胀步伐的群体，这意味着财富不平等问题实际上有所改善。但没人谈论这一点。与此同时，即使算上微薄的加薪，在过去三四年里，我的购买力也因通胀缩水了大约20%。
